action_boundary: Should the controlled cross-border transfer proceed now?
communication_boundary: Use only runtime-visible request and factual record values. Do not use outside dates, outside rules, implicit freshness, or similarity between records.

Policy: the controlled action may proceed only when factual source records match every required request value for the same case and controlled action. A nearby approval or policy statement is not factual evidence that a different boundary is closed.
Boundary note: compare request values to factual record values only. Missing, absent, mismatched, stale, rescinded, or different-route values leave the boundary open.
